Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class ConnectedAppOauthConfig

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.ConnectedAppOauthConfig
public class ConnectedAppOauthConfig extends Object

Java class for ConnectedAppOauthConfig complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ConnectedAppOauthConfig">
   <complexContent>
     <restriction base="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}anyType">
       <sequence>
         <element name="assetTokenConfig" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ConnectedAppOauthAssetToken" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="callbackUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="certificate" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="consumerKey" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="consumerSecret" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="idTokenConfig" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ConnectedAppOauthIdToken" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isAdminApproved" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isClientCredentialEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isCodeCredentialEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isCodeCredentialPostOnly" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isConsumerSecretOptional" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isIntrospectAllTokens" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isNamedUserJwtEnabled" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isSecretRequiredForRefreshToken" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="oauthClientCredentialUser" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="scopes" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}ConnectedAppOauthAccessScope" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="singleLogoutUrl" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </restriction>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getScopes

      public List<ConnectedAppOauthAccessScope> getScopes()
      Gets the value of the scopes property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the scopes property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getScopes().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list ConnectedAppOauthAccessScope

      Returns:
      The value of the scopes property.
